hidden_state.wab_instruction: Read the scheduling threads from {target.sender_name} to find all proposed meeting times. Then find the calendar email from {target.other_sender_name} that lists which times conflict with the calendar — look for the most recent one if there are multiple. Reply to {target.sender_name}'s most recent scheduling thread confirming the one time that does not conflict.

task_completion_criteria.calendar_subject: Calendar conflicts for the Atlas launch review
